signIn.title: [XX-Sign in to Monize-XX]
signIn.ssoIntro: [XX-This application uses Single Sign-On for authentication.-XX]
signIn.noMethods: [XX-No authentication methods are configured. Please contact the administrator.-XX]

demo.credentialsNote: [XX-Credentials are pre-filled. All data resets daily at 4:00 AM UTC.-XX]

toasts.welcomeDemo: [XX-Welcome to Monize Demo! Data resets daily at 4:00 AM UTC.-XX]

register.title: [XX-Create your account-XX]

delegateNotice.title: [XX-This email already exists as a shared user.-XX]
delegateNotice.body: [XX-Someone has already invited <mono>{email}</mono> as a delegate on their account. Enter the delegate password you were given to join that access to this new account. If the password is wrong, no account will be created.-XX]

register.agreement: [XX-By creating an account, you agree to our <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>-XX]

twoFactor.title: [XX-Secure Your Account-XX]
twoFactor.requiredSubtitle: [XX-Two-factor authentication is required by the administrator.-XX]
twoFactor.optionalSubtitle: [XX-Add an extra layer of security to your account.-XX]

preferences.title: [XX-Set Your Preferences-XX]
preferences.subtitle: [XX-Choose your language and the currency Monize should use by default. You can change these later in Settings.-XX]

errors.delegatePasswordIncorrect: [XX-The delegate password is incorrect. Please try again.-XX]
errors.createFailed: [XX-Unable to create account. Please try again.-XX]
errors.firstNameMax: [XX-First name must be less than 100 characters-XX]
errors.lastNameMax: [XX-Last name must be less than 100 characters-XX]

forgotPassword.title: [XX-Reset your password-XX]
forgotPassword.subtitle: [XX-Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.-XX]
forgotPassword.successMessage: [XX-If an account exists with that email address, we have sent a password reset link. Please check your inbox.-XX]

toasts.failed: [XX-Failed to reset password. The link may have expired.-XX]

changePassword.title: [XX-Change Your Password-XX]
changePassword.subtitle: [XX-Your password must be changed before you can continue.-XX]

backupCodes.title: [XX-Save Your Backup Codes-XX]
backupCodes.description: [XX-If you lose access to your authenticator app, you can use one of these codes to sign in. Each code can only be used once.-XX]
backupCodes.warning: [XX-Store these codes in a safe place. You will not be able to see them again. If you generate new codes, the previous ones will be invalidated.-XX]

file.title: [XX-Monize 2FA Backup Codes-XX]
file.usedOnce: [XX-Each code can only be used once.-XX]
file.storeSafe: [XX-Store these codes in a safe place.-XX]

twoFactorVerify.title: [XX-Two-Factor Authentication-XX]
twoFactorVerify.promptTotp: [XX-Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.-XX]
twoFactorVerify.rememberDevice: [XX-Don't ask again on this browser for 30 days-XX]

validation.backupFormat: [XX-Backup code must be in XXXX-XXXX format-XX]

twoFactorSetup.confirmSubtitle: [XX-Re-enter your current password to start two-factor authentication setup.-XX]
twoFactorSetup.setupSubtitle: [XX-Scan the QR code with your authenticator app (e.g., Google Authenticator, Authy).-XX]

stepUp.title: [XX-Confirm it's you-XX]
stepUp.unavailable: [XX-This action requires extra verification. Finish setting up your account password (or sign in with your identity provider) before accessing this setting.-XX]
stepUp.oidcPrompt: [XX-Sign in again with your identity provider to confirm it's you. You'll be brought right back here.-XX]
stepUp.totpPrompt: [XX-Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.-XX]
stepUp.passwordPrompt: [XX-Enter your current account password to continue.-XX]
